results.name: Power Budget
results.evidence: First-order current budget from BOM assumptions.
results.recommendation: Power rails have first-order current margin.

results.name: RF Microstrip Impedance
results.evidence: Closed-form Hammerstad-style microstrip estimate for the specified stackup.
results.recommendation: Confirm with manufacturer stackup field solver and keep RF trace via-free on top layer.

results.name: Thermal Estimate
results.recommendation: Validate with real load current and copper area once final footprints are bound.

results.name: Decoupling Coverage
results.evidence: Ilk-derece decoupling kapsama analizi (board): 9 kondansator / 8 aktif IC.
results.recommendation: Decoupling kapsama ilk-derece yeterli; yerlesim mesafesi PCB'de dogrulanmali.

results.name: AC Safety Clearance & Engineering Reality
results.evidence: Tüm manuel mühendislik maddeleri Abraham (Bas Muhendis) tarafından 2026-05-26T18:51:03+00:00 tarihinde imzalandı (datasheet pinout, RF stackup, AC sertifikasyon, SPICE). AC rule area: VAR.
results.recommendation: Sign-off kaydedildi. Yine de fiziksel üretim öncesi üretici DFM ve prototip doğrulaması önerilir.
